authoredBy.description: Byline that shows the author of the dataset review.

backLink.description: Text for a link that takes the user back to the list of the reviews for the dataset.

seeDataset.description: Text for a link that takes the user to dataset itself.

published.description: Label for the date when the dataset review was published.

license.description: Label for the license of the dataset review.

competingInterests.description: Label for the section that contains information about the author’s competing interests.

noCompetingInterestsStatement.message: The author declares that they have no competing interests.
noCompetingInterestsStatement.description: Text shown alongside the heading “Competing interests”.
